summary: Excellent venue‑sounding audience recording of a solid solstice show, praised as great throughout.
review: All three reviewers highlight the high quality of this recording, noting that it captures the ambience of the venue and sounds just like being there. The performance itself is described as a "nice solstice show" and "great", with no complaints about specific songs or moments. With consistent five‑star praise (and one four‑star), both the audio fidelity and musical delivery are regarded very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews uniformly rate the show 4–5 stars, praising both sound quality and performance; with three consistent reviews confidence is high.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, venue‑like ambience captured faithfully; no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall strong performance described as a nice solstice show; reviewers had no criticism of pacing or song selection.
